news:news.news:title: Iran is reportedly using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, raising serious humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, Iran child security roles, Lebanon peacekeeper casualties, India census 2026, Chiang Mai air pollution health risks

news:news.news:title: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.
news:news.news:keywords: US fuel prices and market impact, Iran conflict and economic implications, Federal funding for public broadcasting, Millionaire tax in Washington state, OpenAI profitability and IPO prospects

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various tech products, while new AI developments continue to emerge in the technology sector.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, AI advancements in technology, smart home devices deals

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the U.S. soccer team struggles with a loss to Portugal.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods treatment announcement, USMNT soccer loss to Portugal, NFL Rooney Rule support, Italy World Cup elimination, Ovechkin's record-breaking season

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into asteroids, blood pressure management, evolutionary biology, and the behavior of materials, highlighting ongoing advancements in various fields.
news:news.news:keywords: asteroid chemistry, blood pressure management, squid evolution, deep sleep benefits, non-drug arthritis therapies

news:news.news:title: Spain has closed its airspace to US aircraft involved in the Iran war, following a denial of military base access to the US.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in Europe, Israeli law on death penalty, US military operations in Iran, cultural recognition in Australia, refugee policies in Germany

news:news.news:title: Brent crude oil prices surged to $116 a barrel amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, while US stock markets continued to decline for the fifth consecutive week.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price surge due to Middle East tensions, impact of US-Iran conflict on markets, Air Canada CEO resignation news, minimum wage increase campaigns in US, challenges for US border businesses

news:news.news:title: Rec Room, a competitor to Roblox, is shutting down despite having over 150 million users and a peak valuation of $3.5 billion.
news:news.news:keywords: Rec Room shutdown news, Amazon Big Spring Sale highlights, new smart lock technology, advancements in packaging, interoperable video calls between iPhone and Android

news:news.news:title: The Final Four for Women's March Madness is set with Texas and South Carolina advancing, while the NBA sees significant player developments and challenges in officiating.
news:news.news:keywords: Women's March Madness updates, NBA player controversies, MLB officiating challenges

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into sleep's impact on health, the effectiveness of non-drug therapies for arthritis, and new cosmic phenomena.
news:news.news:keywords: sleep and muscle growth, non-drug treatments for arthritis, cosmic explosions and physics, supermassive black holes, Big Bang theories

news:news.news:title: Iran Deploys Children in Security Roles as US Fuel Prices Hit $4, Tiger Woods Steps Back from Golf
Spain Bans US Aircraft as Brent Oil Prices Soar to $116 Amid Middle East Crisis
